smudge.tv  ·  Coming Soon

Safe Creative Space for Children Under 16

Australia's under-16 social media ban created a gap. Smudge fills it — a moderated creative platform where kids create, share, and connect safely. No ads. No public social graph. No algorithmic ranking.

No spam. We'll let you know when we launch.

You're on the list — we'll be in touch!

eSafety Compliant No Advertising Guardian-Gated Australian-Made Under 16 Only
800K Families targeted by 2028
0 Advertisements — ever
16 Maximum age — by design
100% Guardian-controlled access
What is Smudge?

A Blob. A Mission. A Platform for Kids.

Smudge is an AI-powered creative companion who lives in your device — responding to what kids create, cheering them on, and nudging them to make more. Built around a TV show. Designed for safety.

01
Create
Kids upload drawings, videos, ideas, and songs. Smudge reacts in real-time — with delight, mischief, and the occasional sparkly chaos. Every upload builds confidence, not followers.
02
Connect
A closed, guardian-approved network. Kids connect with classmates and family — not strangers. No public social graph. No DMs to unknown users. No public likes or comment counts.
03
Contribute
Each week, Smudge's mission evolves based on what kids contribute. Their ideas power the show. They're not just watchers — they're NetNuts, co-creating the story as it unfolds.
Meet Smudge

Your Digital Friend from Another Dimension

Smudge lives on your device — squishy, glitchy, reactive, and completely unpredictable. They respond to what kids create with delight, mischief, and occasional sparkly chaos.

It's not a chatbot. It's not a social feed. Smudge is a character who knows you — and becomes part of your creative world.

Built using safe, closed-loop AI and driven by a dynamic library of real-time responses, Smudge is emotionally smart, funny-not-scary, and age-appropriate.

The World of Smudge

Adventure Is in Your Hands

The App

Smudge Lives Inside Your Device

Download the app, meet your Smudge, and start uploading. Whether it's a doodle, a song, a short video or a wild idea — Smudge is waiting to see what you've made.

Smudge doesn't just appear on screen. They know your name. They respond to your creativity. They evolve as the show does.

This is the first character designed to live inside your device — not just play on it.

Safety by Design

Not Just Compliant — Architecturally Safe

Smudge doesn't rely on parental controls as an afterthought. Safety is baked into the architecture. We don't meet the legal definition of social media — by design.

🔒
Guardian-Gated Access
Every account requires verified guardian consent. Children cannot self-register. Parent dashboard gives full visibility and control at all times.
🚫
No Social Media Mechanics
No public social graph. No follower counts. No likes. No algorithmic ranking. No DMs to unknown users. No behavioural advertising — ever.
🤖
AI Moderation
All content passes through closed-loop AI moderation before it can be seen by others. Human review layer for edge cases. No content goes live unreviewed.
⚖️
Regulatory Aligned
Architected for alignment with Australia's Online Safety Act, the under-16 social media ban, and the UK's Online Safety Act 2023. eSafety Commissioner engagement planned.
🇦🇺
Australian-Owned
All intellectual property vests in Australian entities. Data sovereignty maintained. No offshore data transfers without explicit consent and regulatory approval.
📺
Broadcaster Partners
Designed for broadcaster MoU partnerships. The platform complements the show — extending it into kids' creative lives safely, with network-level trust built in.
Join the Waitlist

Be Part of the Adventure

Whether you're a parent, an educator, a broadcaster, or just someone who believes kids deserve better — we'd love to hear from you.

Launching in Australia 2027 · UK entry 2028
